foreignObject.div:
Tantalus
(Talos)

Freezing in place
uhh....

Trying a different technique
Right, so like-

Meek
Well I, did-

I have done it before,{0.3}
yeah.
I mean-
I'm not *that* bad at it.-
yeah.

Nodding
yeah, yeah- I'm looking, I'm
looking.

Nodding
Yeah, yeah I see that.

Slightly confused
yeah okay.

Wincing
Yikes.

Head empty, no thoughts
Uhhh... Yeah, yeah.

Somewhat overwhelmed
Got it.
Sure- sure.
Yeah alright.

Quick nod
Okay.

Meek
Yeah, I'll work on that now.

Grabbing another shamonion
Okie dokie, artichokie.

Faux snobbishness
Hah, as if I wanted to.

Scowling
Well good then; I wasn't offering.

Dazed
Uh yeah, it's alright.

Moving to the sink
Well...

1. Everything's going fine,
I mean-
2. There are some small niggles
here and there, but-
3. Honestly, I'm not sure if
I can tell yet.

Putting on gloves
I'm finally starting to get
the hang of things.

Grabbing a karot
Yeah-

Applying shampoo
I know where most things are
now.
My chops are getting quicker-

Embarrassed
Well okay, yeah, not...

I'm still getting used to these
weird cleavers.

Annoyed
Yeah, but I don't.

I prefer my customized set
of-
Well I-
It's just...

Defeated
...
whatever.

Rinsing off shampoo
So how about you?
How are you doing?

Shocked
5 hour meeting!?
And that took you 5 hours!?
That's it?
Wow, that sounds...

Putting karot in bubble bath
Yikes.

Grabbing another karot
Hang on a..-

Shaving karot
Isn't there supposed to be
another typey typey code monkey
helping you out?

Eyebrows raised
Wait really?

Steph told me that he had already
begun induction.

Satiated
Ah, that explains why I haven't
seen him yet.

Annoyed
Ugh, yeah, I know... Happens
often...

Soaking karot in bath
For some damn reason

Grabbing a karot
It's mostly fine.

Embarassed
Well, okay, yeah, yes...
Uhhhhhh....

Trying to save the situation
My chops are improving though-
I'm getting better at things.

Massaging karot
Yeah, it's just...
You know,{0.3} small things.

Nodding
Yeah... yeah it is...

Brows furrowed, mildly irritated
I mean, why aren't-

Why aren't we allowed to use
our own knives?

Rubbing karot in circular motions
It's ridiculous!

Finishing up
Yeah, but these cleavers suck!

Putting karot in bubble bath
They're big and clunky and
you can't really optimize-

Dispondant
but-

Grabbing another karot
*sigh* never mind...

Tattooing karot
Why not?
It's useful...

It's got these really nice
big pockets in them.

Well that sounds like a *you*
problem, if I'm being honest.

None
. . .

Annoyed
Stephanie said it's fine, just
as long as I wear it under
the apron.
Yes.

Very aggressive needlework
The guide said nothing about
cloaks.

Irrate
Yes.
Yes, I did.

Dispondant
yeah ok.

Putting karot in bath
. . .

Putting on gloves
Well, I'm quite new.

I've never done something like
this before.-

Grabbing a karot
So obviously,{0.3} I wouldn't
know enough about it yet to
tell if it's good or not.

Spanking karot
So,{0.3} yeah.
Sorry.
It's just-

I just,don't *know* enough
yet.

You can't know something that
you don't know, and-

I feel as if I don't know enough
about this job to form a proper
opinion on it yet,-

Spreading karot
So If I say anything now, I'll
basically be lying.

Milking karot
I might as well be making something
up, just to have something
to say.
And I'd rather not do that.

We'll just have to wait for
a while and see.
Then I can answer that question.

Cleaning up
I'm sorry.

Putting karot in bath
Thanks.

Plucking out another karot
I was just grinding some spices.

Rubbing karot
Oh uhhh, I did a double major
in Recipe design and Food
implementation.

Yeah, I also have a minor in
culinary analysis.

But I'm not really good at
that.

Squeezing karot
Yeah, yeah,- I know.

I was looking around for a
while, found this job listing.-

And it mentioned something
about recipe formulation.

So I thought "Hey! This might
be a job for me".
I was horribly mistaken.

Edging karot
Yes. Really.

I have no idea why it said
that.

We're just doing basic commercial
cooking in this department.
And that's it!

Stroking karot
Yeah, I'm not joking.

During the interview, they
asked me a bunch of generic
formulation questions.

And then we started discussing
typey typey code monkey salaries.

Then I show up and It's all
just basic meal implementation!

I have absolutely no idea what's
going on.

Draining karot
Yeah, you just have to do a
bunch of tedious prep work,
by hand!

Then dump it into these unnecessarily
convoluted machines and set
the appropriate, pre-determined
settings.
And that's it!

Cleaning up
They give you all of the instructions
and everything, and you just
have to follow them.
That's it!

And, I'm just like...{0.3}
why???
haha, thanks, I'll try.

Perked up
Oh, ohhhhhhhh,{0.3} okay then.
Hmmmmm.

Putting karot in bath
Yeah, I'll definitely consider
it, thanks.

Rinsing hands
No, I'm also making my first
soup.

Washing forceps
Well, this is the first time
I'm doing it all by myself.

And it'll be actually served
to a customer.

Drying forceps
Boba and Kabbage.

Pointing at stove unit
Yeah, it's over there.
Just simmering.

Putting down forceps
Oh wait-

Terminating the cooking cycle
Well,-

Releasing stove lock
No, not really.

Removing pan/pot from stove
I've had lots of practice.

Pouring soup into bowl
Or at least enough practice.
I think...

Slight smirk
But then again, how can I tell?

Placing toppings
Almost!

Registering dish as prepared
Yeah, kind of.

Loading pot into cleaning unit
Eh, not too bad.

Modestly unsure
Uh, thanks.

Actually unsure
Well-

A bit more practice wouldn't
hurt.

Confused
"Well" what?
Huh?

Taken aback
Oh, wait-
I have to do that myself?

Slightly dejected
*sigh*

Still dejected
Thanks.

Picking up dish
Same.

Placing down soup
Here you go ma'am

Standing back respectfully
It's my pleasure.
Enjoy.

Caught offguard
..what?

Also confused
What? No,-

I...{0.3} already served the
soup to them{0.3}?

Quite confused
What?

Very confused
What do you mean feed it to
them?
Like, hand feed them?

Absolutely bewildered
Wait really?
Oh. What?

Combative
Well, how was I supposed to
know that?
Why do I even need to do that?

What do you mean 'hand feed
the-'

Deflated
Uhh... Yeah.
Sheesh.

Awkward
Excuse me ma'am,-
My apologies.

I believe that I were to be
be assisting you? With..-

Taking a seat next to her
Nah nah, don't worry.

Scooping up a spoonful of soup
I really should be the one
apologizing.

Trying to be polite
Haha, thanks.

None
. . .

Feeding another spoonful
It's good.
How about you?

Caught slighty by surprise
Oh yeah, yeah.
I wear it everyday.

Forthright
Well, it has big pockets.-

It protects me from the sun,
the rain,-

I can use it as a blanket,
or a mat.-
It's useful.

Shrugging
Eh, you can't really wear sleeves
in this kind of climate.

Cooling another spoonful
Sure ma'am.

Smiling politely
Thank you ma'am

Awkward
Uhhh, I made the...{0.3} I
am the chef.

Nodding awkwardly
Yes.

Shrugging awkwardly
I'm not sure...{0.3} It was
just provided to me.

Awkward
Thank you..?

None
. . .

quickly looking away
Ah no, I didn't mean-

Quietly panicking
I-I don't mean to offend you-

Unsure how to react
Uhhh...

Thinking of something to say
I{0.3} see.{}.{}?

Cleaning up
I can't guarantee that.-

But you never know what tomorrow
holds.

Getting up
Ah, that's a bit unfortu-

Caught by surprise
I,- Ummm... Thank you,{w} I'll
think about it.
Stephanie

NONE
Wait, what are you doing?

Hands raised in confusion
No! You're supposed to cut
them in circles, those are
ovals.

Outraged
What!? No! That's worse!

Have you never peeled shamonions
before!?

Facepalming
Ughh,-

Leaning over my shoulder
Here, let me show you.

Grabbing a new shamonion
Make sure you're paying attention-

Eyebrows raised
Alright?

Annoyed
Are you looking?

Satiated
Okay good.

Composing thoughts
So, you see-
It's actually quite simple.

Manhandling shamonion
First, you have to grab the
head,
like this, alright?

Giving a better view of her
grip
Look at how I'm holding this.

Slight scowl
Are you following me?

Resuming composure
Alright then.

Positioning knife
Now, you have to do a really
thin slice,-

Using only the tip of the blade
from the top, all the way down
to the anus.

Placing knife on jaw
Then come back up here,-

Gently painting on lacerations
and draw a few pretty little
X's all over the cheeks.

Maneuvering between the throat
and neck muscles
Then gently slide the knife
in, like this.

Get behind the throat, without
breaking it,-

Holding the knife at a perfect
vertical
and slice all the way down
to the stomach.

Cutting in circles
Disembowel, separate the small
and large intestines,-

Looking back at me disapprovingly
in circular motions! Make sure
you use circular motions!
Alright?

Gentle twitching
Then you tickle the liver.

Short jabs
Poke the lungs.

Quick flicking motion
Remove the appendix.

Stepping back
And there you go!

Gesturing at the shamonion
rings
See, look at all these beautiful
stars.

Brimming with pride
That's how it's done!

Pointing non-specifically
You could also make little
sun shapes too-

You just have to separate the
fagiggly gland from the gizzard,
before working on the liver.

Glancing back at me
Make sure you use an upwards
motion for that.

Gesturing with knife
Like this, it has to be like
this.

Eyebrow raised
Alright?
You got all that?

Skeptical
So... You can handle *all*
of this by yourself?

Doubtful
Alright then.

If you have difficulty remembering,
make sure to write it down,
alright?

Gesturing at herself arrogantly
I'm fine. I don't need to,
I have a very good memory.

Waving hand around in circles
But if you're struggling with
this stuff... just..-

Make sure that you're taking
notes.

Returning back to other tasks
And don't forget to wash the
karots.

Furrowed brow
This is the third time I'm
reminding you.

Leaving for another task
Okay good.

Glancing back
and also umm...

Waving hand in circles
Just call me if you need any
help, alright?

Looking back conceitedly
Ewww, no,{0.3} don't choke
me.

Sneering
I'd prefer someone who isn't,
you know,{w=0.3} quite as
hairy.

Flipping hair
Ppfft, as if you could.

{slighly small}
Good!

Taking off gloves
So how was it?

Putting on apron
Ah okay, that's good.

Leaning in close
Let me have a look at it,-
hmmm...

Prodding with spoon
Your bobas are a bit under
cooked, and the Kabbage seems
a bit mushy-

Taking out a scoop
Other than that, it's fine.

Tasting soup
.{0.3}.{0.3}.

Nodding
Good job

Wiping spoon
Do you think you can handle
these things by yourself?
-In the future?

Putting everything back in
place
Alright.
Well..?

Also confused
What are you standing around
here for?

Annoyed
Go serve it to the customer!

Indignant
Yes!? What do you think we
hired you for?
Ugh, kids these days-

Talking on the tablet
So I'll need you to-

Spotting me
Huh?

Confused
What are you doing here?

Aren't you supposed to be with
the customer?

Tending to the Tablet
Oh no not you dear, I'm talking
to someone else.
Give me a moment.

Looking back at me
Why not!?

Facepalming
OH MY-!
Ugh!
No!

Italian fingers
You're supposed to feed it
to them.

Exasperated
Yes!

Yes!{0.3} No.{0.3} Use a spoon,-{0.3}
but yes.

Angry
Yes!
What do you mean "what"?

Exploding
Enough!
That is enough!

Stop asking so many annoying
questions.
Stop creating a fuss.

Just go back, apologize to
the customer, and feed them.
Like you're supposed to.

It's not my fault that you
can't pay attention.
Alright?
Can you handle that much?

Seething
Good, now go.
Boh'ne
Monika

NONE
Soo...
How's everything going so far?

Pretending to not be concerned
Getting used to things?

Relaxing slightly
haha.
How alright?

Friendly smirk
Oh, really? That's nice.

Looking at my sloppily chopped
shamonions
Ha, yeah I can see that.

Exasperated
Everyone uses these talos.

Weary
Yes, yes, I know.
But what were you expecting?

Smirking wearily
Oh, I'm fine-

I just got out of a 5 hour
meeting.

Nodding
Haha yes, 5 hours.

Rolling eyes
They were showing us how to
deploy a recipe on the new
delivery handling framework.

Shrugging
I just had to sit there and
take notes as Domin deployed
an item.

Nodding
Yep, It was only supposed to
take around 2 hours, but-

Shrugging
You know how unstable the servers
can be sometimes.

NONE
...

Wincing slightly
I know,{0.3} and now I have
around 20 different soups
I need to get up and running
before the end of the week.
It's going to be hectic.

Tentative
Yeah, He's coming in next week.

Confused
Huh?{0.3} Oh, haha.

Jovial
No not really.

We just had a chat with him
last week.
Mostly introductions and Chit-Chat.

It was held over comms, nothing
serious.

Recollecting
His proper induction starts
next week.

Jovial
Haha yes, I think you just
got confused.

Looking at the 'badly chopped'
shamonions
Hmmm-
Yes, I can tell.

Smiling slyly
Oh, really now?

Rolling eyes jovially
Haha- it's always the small
things, isn't it?

Exasperated
{slow}* S i g h *

Talos,{0.3} we've already been
through this.
This is a professional environment.

We need to maintain a very
high standard of hygiene.

We can't just have people bringing
in their own, weird utensils,-
all willy-nilly like.
It poses a huge risk to sanitation.

Annoyed
Everyone uses these Talos.
It's an industry standard.
It should be fine.
You'll get used to it.

Eyebrows raised
And why are you wearing that
cloak?

Apprehensive
I don't think it's very hygienic.
Are you sure about that?

Slighly peeved
I still don't feel like that's
appropriate.

The employee guide should have
said something about-

Perplexed
..?
Are you sure about that?
Did you read it properly?

Cautious
I'm just saying though,-

The guide mostly describes
what *should* be worn, so
just-..
Unless I'm mistaken?

Diplomatic
I think that maybe...{0.3}
she's letting you get away
with it just because you're
new.

Maybe you should check back
with her again and clarify
things.
I'm just saying.

Perplexed
Oh really..?
Why not?

Peeved
but it's a very basic question.

I don't see why you can't answer
it-

Contemplating
Hmmm,-

Well that's quite an interesting
perspective.

Eyebrow raised
So..-

What were you doing before
this?

Implied facepalm
No, I meant before you started
work here.

Intrigued
Oh, really now?
Wow.
So what did you train in?

Intrigued
Oh really now?

Nodding
Ah okay, interesting.

Confused
Wait-

What are you doing over here
then?

Very amused
Oh wait really?
Haha, seriously?

Mind blown
wow.

Losing it
Hahahahah!
Hahahaha,-{0.3} you know.

Casual
You should come over to our
side, it'll be fun.

Frank
No, I'm serious.

I heard that they'll be hiring
more monkeys next year.

Casual
Yeah, no problem.

Looking off to the side
So, anyways-

Head cocked
What are you working on now?
Just prep?

Surprised
Oh really?

Confused
You haven't made a soup yet?

Satiated
Oh haha okay,{0.3} what soup
is it?

Nodding slightly
Oh, nice.

Ribbing
Are you nervous?

Rolling eyes
Oh, of course.

Jovial
haha-
You'll be fine, don't worry.

Jovial
You excited?
Hahahaha

Just standing there awkwardly
*dry cough*

Very awkward
Haha, good luck.

Waving
See you around.
Helen

Gentle croaky voice
Thank you dear.

Hasn't touched her soup yet
Mmmm?

Completely calm
Ah yes, sorry about that dear.

Holding her hand up
Don't bother dear, it's absolutely
fine.

In between mouthfuls
So,{0.3} how's your day going?
I'm fine dear.

None
. . .

Slightly curious
Do you wear that cloak often?
If you don't mind me asking?
Oh really now?{0.3} Why?

Preplexed
Wouldn't a coat do the same?

Satisfied
Ah I see.

Reminiscing
I used to wear a cloak too.

Gazing away wistfully
When I was out on the farm.

None
. . .

Looking back at me
Can you do me a favor?

Earnest
Can you send my compliments
to the chef?
I'm quite enjoying this.

Somewhat confused
Pardon?

Delighted
Oh,{0.3} you cooked this soup
yourself?
Oh, wonderful!

Where did you get these ingredients
from?

I love the thymee in here,
it's so sparkly.

It's almost as potent as the
thymee I grow at home.

Polite
Ah yes, I see that you've noticed
my hands.
They are rather...{0.3} specialized.
I know.
I had normal hands,-

Gesturing at her hands
But when you do one thing,
and one thing only, you get
quite good at it.

Dejected
Unfortunately, you also tend
to loose the ability to do
other things as effectively.-
Like using spoons.

After finishing the last spoonful
You are quite interesting to
talk to.

Mournful
Too bad that we've run out
of time,{0.3} and I cannot
stay any longer.
Will you be serving me tomorrow?

Deeply considering something
That is quite true dear.

Leaning forward
I still have a small farm by-the-by.
It's in quite a state now,-

I don't have much time to look
after it any more.

Reminiscing
My nephew used to come along
and help sometimes,{0.3} but
he also had to go corporate.

Very earnest
I would love it if you were
to come by and visit.
I'll show you around the place.

You can even take back some
produce.

I have more than enough for
my needs.
Start Game
[ Awkward Pause ]
[ brief pause ]

[ Brief pause ]
as the scene transitions from
a chopped shamonion to a new
shamonion
[ Awkward Pause ]
[ Awkward pause ]
Helen's name here is Customer

the next few lines from stephanie
are slighly fast:
Goto Map

maybe there's a knife strew

chopped, (with remnants of
blood, etc. still visible))

(with No Sparkles, peels and

div.i:
(Maybe the entire scene extends
slightly left or right? And
can be panned slightly? NO,
this is unnecessary adding
unnecesary complexity, note
this down as another optional
feature that can be added
if I have the time.)

foreignObject.div:

(Mysterious, disguised stranger,
wearing shawl, sitting and
waiting at table, looking
away, not directly at talos.
!No Soup on the table!)

(Soup appears in the scene,
(with animated steam))

div.i:
(Slides off the screen towards
the right)
((The soup is already there))

(The soup is reduced a little
from full. The ingredients
floating on top have changed.)

(The soup is at a medium level
in the bowl. There is no more
steam rising from the bowl
(transition occurs after the
first ‘.’))

(Helens hands appear on the
table, she is leaning towards
talos (in an excited pose).
She her face is visible, old,
and bright, but still might
appear quite secluded, due
to the shadows.)

(The level of the soup is low,
but there’s still a little
bit left (transition occurs
after the first ‘.’))
(All the soup is finished)
(Scene fades from day to evening)

(The empty soup bowl fades
out of the scene)
(Fade to black)

NONE
*sigh.*
The things I do for a paycheck.

Cautiously slicing down to
the anus
She's fun and personable.

Getting caught on the dangly
bit
Constantly laying it on thick.

Wiggling knife back and forth
It gets a bit much at times,
but-

Finally reaching the anus
I guess that's just me.

Lifting knife upto jaw
Everyone else seems to be very
appreciative of it.

Lacerating
So I...{0.3} Guess I might
be being a bit...

I mean, she's doing her thing,
and it's definitely working
out for her.
She's friends with everyone.

Sliding knife behind throat
She makes a great impression
on strangers

Cutting down to the stomach
She really knows how to work
the stakeholders and higher
ups.

Disemboweling
She knows the game, she knows
how to relate and communicate
and maneuver her way around
this circus.

Accidentally rupturing the
spleen
She definitely knows what she's
doing-

Skipping a beat
...

Finishing the disemboweling
She does party a bit too much
though.

Trying to scoop out the mess
And that's fine, that's fine.

Grabbing a towel
Some people are just into those
kind of things.

Wiping up the remainder
She enjoys drinking.

Harrasing organs
Plenty of guys approach her.

Removing the appendix
Lots of interesting conversation.

Chopping balls in half
She's definitely found her
place here.

Cutting off unnecessary jewelry
They're trying to introduce
me into that lifestyle.

Peeling back thick fur coat
But unfortunately, that's not
my thing...

Extracting shamonion
It's really not my thing.

Wiping off goo
Normally, I would just take
it as a sign to leave-

Slicing down to the anus
But unfortunately, the job
market isn't actually as..,{0.3}
diverse as I was expecting.

Lacerating
At least, not right now.
So here I am.

Slicing into neck
But, all things considered-

Cutting down to stomach
It's not that bad.

Disemboweling in 'circles'
She's not that bad either.
Her world is nice.

Harrasing organs
It would be nice to party and
socialize.

Removing appendix
Join that crowd of happy smiling
faces.

Chopping balls in half
That is nice. Everything is
nice. This is just how things
work.

None
. . .

Pausing
My bullshit detector is just
going off the fucking charts
right now.
That stupid siren.

That screaming, pounding alarm
bell.

Breathing heavily
I just-
It's just-

It just keeps going on and
on at the back of my head.

Breathing very heavily
It keeps telling me-

It just keeps telling me to
get out.
To leave as soon as I can.

Fists clenched tightly
Somethings wrong.
This isn't ideal.
Find something else.
Don't do this.

Rapid twitching
And it doesn't tell me why!
why?
Why?
WHY!?

It's.{0.3} So.{0.3} Bloody.{0.3}
Unbearable.
Ahhhh!
